gates.title: Runtime update propagates packaged core scripts through F0.6 shims
evidence_required: src/auto_update.py preserves the F0.6 scripts -> core/scripts symlink and copies packaged scripts to the resolved core directory
Core scripts are overwritten from packaged source even when an old registry scan classified the existing file as non-script
Personal script collisions remain preserved
tests/test_startup_preflight.py::test_copy_runtime_from_source_updates_core_script_through_f06_shim pins the active watchdog LaunchAgent path

gates.title: Runtime maintenance diagnostics stay quiet when the installation is healthy
evidence_required: src/doctor/providers/runtime.py compares LaunchAgent weekday/weekdays schedules with the same declared schedule shape used by cron sync
Release audit traces are scoped as operator_history so installation_live health is not degraded by old release artifacts
Automation telemetry tolerates sparse high-coverage usage gaps and still degrades on material missing usage coverage
Local-index hygiene retries transient SQLite locks and treats truncated quick scans as clean when no residue remains
src/scripts/nexo-watchdog.sh reads runtime/cognitive/cognitive.db with legacy fallback and observes alive long-running cron workers without warning

gates.title: Client sync only writes managed MCP defaults after provider staging is healthy
evidence_required: src/client_sync.py calls reconcile_managed_mcp(apply=True) before merging managed MCP entries into JSON or TOML client configs
_managed_mcp_entries_for(...) returns no entries unless every provider required by the generated server entries reports status=healthy
JSON and TOML sync remove stale NEXO-owned managed MCP entries when staging fails while preserving user-owned entries
tests/test_managed_mcp.py and tests/test_managed_mcp_release_gate.py keep the no-npx-fallback release blocker covered

gates.title: Packaged installs keep receiving the managed MCP runtime package
evidence_required: bin/nexo-brain.js copies managed_mcp as a runtime package
src/auto_update.py preserves managed_mcp during packaged updates and copies the managed MCP runner
tests/test_managed_mcp.py::test_managed_mcp_runtime_copy_includes_package_and_runner pins the runtime package contract

gates.title: Managed MCP provider locks are checked against npm latest before release
evidence_required: scripts/verify_managed_mcp_lock.py compares src/managed_mcp/lock.json against npm latest version, integrity, tarball and binary metadata
scripts/pre-release-verify.sh still runs the managed-mcp-lock step before release readiness and pytest
tests/test_managed_mcp_release_gate.py covers stale locks, update behavior and MCP binary selection

gates.title: Product Knowledge remains aligned with managed backend surfaces
evidence_required: scripts/verify_product_surface_alignment.py reconciles backend route families with catalog capabilities and source refs
scripts/pre-release-verify.sh runs product-surface before managed-mcp-lock, release readiness and pytest
tests/test_product_surface_alignment.py covers valid alignment, unmapped managed route prefixes and missing backend source refs

gates.title: Structured Product Knowledge catalog remains valid
evidence_required: scripts/verify_product_kb.py validates the structured catalog
tests/test_product_knowledge.py keeps search, answers, handlers, validation and system catalog discoverability covered

gates.title: Public tool map remains synchronized with server exports
evidence_required: tool-enforcement-map.json includes the live NEXO server tools
scripts/verify_tool_map.py passes against server.py and plugin tools

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.30.26
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page and sitemap reference v7.30.26
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.30.26
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.30.26 contract before tag publish
